content:
UID: 100815557

Best relationship in the entire game, the unbreakable bond between 24 and Jenkins.

I wanted so much to see the illustration of 24 snapping and tearing them into pieces that I've done it myself.
The Morimens artists' coloring style is so hard to copy for me. But I'm just a 2D animator so colors is a try hard territory for my untrained eyes.

Please... Buff 24 !
